observations.note: Excellent test coverage (29 tests, 100% pass). Tests properly organize by AC and validate dual-path architecture (src/ and .claude/).
Zero orphaned references after rename sweep. Cross-reference validation correctly excludes historical directories (RCA, feedback, archive).
ADR-017 compliance verified - gerund naming (brainstorming) without prefix. Aligns with modern skill naming convention.
Dual-path architecture properly maintained - src/ (distribution) and .claude/ (operational) synchronized with filecmp validation.
All reference updates complete and verified: SKILL.md name field, command invocation, skills-reference, commands-reference, stakeholder-analyst, source-tree context.
Test organization by AC (AC#1-AC#6) matches story structure. Strategic use of historical file exclusion shows architectural understanding.
No anti-gaming violations detected. Tests follow AAA pattern with meaningful names, no skip decorators or empty tests.
